summary: The debt ceiling debate in Congress is becoming louder, and markets are beginning to price a premium on U.S. debt by the end of the year. The Federal Reserve reverse repo activity is at an all-time high to mop up the Treasury’s cash spending.

summary: The Dow turned 125 in May, but it’s hardly in a retiring mood.
